mapper.sql: id, user_uuid, user_name, password, real_name, nick_name, age, sex, birth_day, user_level, phone, role, class_id, target_subject_id, status, image_path, create_time, modify_time, last_active_time, deleted, wx_open_id
mapper.insert: insert into t_user (id, user_uuid, user_name, password, real_name, nick_name, age, sex, birth_day, user_level, phone, role, class_id, target_subject_id, status, image_path, create_time, modify_time, last_active_time, deleted, wx_open_id ) values (#{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{userUuid}::uuid, #{userName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{password,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{realName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{nickName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{age,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{sex,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{birthDay,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{userLevel,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{phone,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{role,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{classId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{targetSubjectId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{imagePath,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{modifyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{lastActiveTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{deleted,jdbcType=BIT}, #{wxOpenId,jdbcType=VARCHAR} )

insert into t_user
id,
user_uuid,
user_name,
password,
real_name,
nick_name,
age,
sex,
birth_day,
user_level,
phone,
role,
class_id,
target_subject_id,
status,
image_path,
create_time,
modify_time,
last_active_time,
deleted,
wx_open_id,
#{id,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{userUuid}::uuid,
#{userName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{password,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{realName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{nickName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{age,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{sex,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{birthDay,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{userLevel,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{phone,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{role,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{classId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{targetSubjectId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{status,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{imagePath,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{modifyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{lastActiveTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{deleted,jdbcType=BIT},
#{wxOpenId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
mapper.update:
update t_user
user_uuid = #{userUuid}::uuid,
user_name = #{userName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
password = #{password,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
real_name = #{realName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
nick_name = #{nickName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
age = #{age,jdbcType=INTEGER},
sex = #{sex,jdbcType=INTEGER},
birth_day = #{birthDay,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
user_level = #{userLevel,jdbcType=INTEGER},
phone = #{phone,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
role = #{role,jdbcType=INTEGER},
class_id = #{classId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
target_subject_id = #{targetSubjectId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
status = #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER},
image_path = #{imagePath,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
modify_time = #{modifyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
last_active_time = #{lastActiveTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
deleted = #{deleted,jdbcType=BIT},
wx_open_id = #{wxOpenId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update t_user set user_uuid = #{userUuid}::uuid, user_name = #{userName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, password = #{password,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, real_name = #{realName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, nick_name = #{nickName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, age = #{age,jdbcType=INTEGER}, sex = #{sex,jdbcType=INTEGER}, birth_day = #{birthDay,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, user_level = #{userLevel,jdbcType=INTEGER}, phone = #{phone,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, role = #{role,jdbcType=INTEGER}, class_id = #{classId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, target_subject_id = #{targetSubjectId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, status = #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER}, image_path = #{imagePath,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, modify_time = #{modifyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, last_active_time = #{lastActiveTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, deleted = #{deleted,jdbcType=BIT}, wx_open_id = #{wxOpenId,jdbcType=VARCHAR} where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}
mapper.select:
select
from t_user where deleted='f' and user_name=#{value} limit 1

select
from t_user where deleted='f' and user_name=#{username} and password=#{pwd} limit 1

select
from t_user where deleted='f' and user_uuid=#{value}::uuid

SELECT
FROM t_user
and deleted='f'
and real_name like concat('%',#{name},'%')
ORDER BY id
limit #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

select count(*) from t_user
and deleted='f'
and real_name like concat('%', #{name}, '%')
mapper.update:
update t_user set age = #{age} where id in
#{id}
mapper.delete:
delete from t_user where id in
#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT count(*) from t_user where deleted='f'
SELECT id as value,user_name as name from t_user where deleted='f' and user_name like concat('%',#{value},'%') limit 5

SELECT id as value,user_name as name from t_user where deleted='f' and role = 1 and user_name like concat('%',#{userName},'%')
and class_id in
#{id}
and 1 = 0
limit 5

select
from t_user where deleted='f' and wx_open_id = #{wxOpenId} limit 1

WITH answer_stats AS ( SELECT a.create_user AS user_id, COUNT(*)::int AS paper_count, COALESCE(SUM(a.question_count), 0)::int AS question_count, COALESCE(SUM(a.question_correct), 0)::int AS correct_count, MAX(a.create_time) AS last_submit_time FROM t_exam_paper_answer a LEFT JOIN t_user answer_user ON answer_user.id = a.create_user WHERE COALESCE(a.class_id, answer_user.class_id) = #{classId} GROUP BY a.create_user ), correction_stats AS ( SELECT r.user_id AS user_id, COUNT(*)::int AS correction_count, COALESCE(SUM(COALESCE(r.resubmit_count, 0)), 0)::int AS resubmit_count FROM t_question_correction_record r LEFT JOIN t_user correction_user ON correction_user.id = r.user_id WHERE COALESCE(r.class_id, correction_user.class_id) = #{classId} AND COALESCE(r.deleted, false) = false GROUP BY r.user_id ) SELECT u.id AS user_id, u.user_name, u.real_name, u.nick_name, COALESCE(a.paper_count, 0) AS paper_count, COALESCE(a.question_count, 0) AS question_count, COALESCE(a.correct_count, 0) AS correct_count, COALESCE(c.correction_count, 0) AS correction_count, COALESCE(c.resubmit_count, 0) AS resubmit_count, a.last_submit_time FROM t_user u LEFT JOIN answer_stats a ON a.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN correction_stats c ON c.user_id = u.id WHERE u.deleted='f' AND u.role = 1 AND u.class_id = #{classId}
